prompt: Three story apartment building to house 34 tenants
svgContent:
<svg viewBox="0 0 800 600" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <!-- Title Block -->
  <rect x="600" y="10" width="190" height="80" fill="white" stroke="black" stroke-width="1"/>
  <text x="605" y="30" font-family="Arial" font-size="14">Project: 3-Story Apartment</text>
  <text x="605" y="50" font-family="Arial" font-size="14">Location: [Site Address]</text>
  <text x="605" y="70" font-family="Arial" font-size="14">Date: October 2023</text>

  <!-- DRAFT Watermark -->
  <text x="400" y="300" font-family="Arial" font-size="60" fill="grey" opacity="0.3" transform="rotate(-30, 400, 300)">DRAFT</text>

  <!-- Foundation Diagram -->
  <!-- Footings -->
  <rect x="150" y="450" width="200" height="50" fill="none" stroke="black" stroke-width="2"/>
  <text x="170" y="470" font-family="Arial" font-size="12">Footing 1</text>
  <rect x="450" y="450" width="200" height="50" fill="none" stroke="black" stroke-width="2"/>
  <text x="470" y="470" font-family="Arial" font-size="12">Footing 2</text>

  <!-- Foundation Wall -->
  <rect x="150" y="400" width="500" height="50" fill="none" stroke="black" stroke-width="2"/>
  <text x="400" y="430" font-family="Arial" font-size="12">Foundation Wall</text>

  <!-- Slab -->
  <rect x="150" y="300" width="500" height="100" fill="none" stroke="black" stroke-width="2"/>
  <text x="400" y="340" font-family="Arial" font-size="12">Concrete Slab</text>

  <!-- North Arrow -->
  <line x1="750" y1="550" x2="750" y2="500" stroke="black" stroke-width="2"/>
  <polygon points="750,480 740,500 760,500" fill="black"/>
  <text x="745" y="570" font-family="Arial" font-size="12">N</text>

  <!-- Scale Bar -->
  <line x1="50" y1="550" x2="250" y2="550" stroke="black" stroke-width="2"/>
  <line x1="50" y1="545" x2="50" y2="555" stroke="black" stroke-width="2"/>
  <line x1="150" y1="545" x2="150" y2="555" stroke="black" stroke-width="2"/>
  <line x1="250" y1="545" x2="250" y2="555" stroke="black" stroke-width="2"/>
  <text x="45" y="570" font-family="Arial" font-size="12">0</text>
  <text x="145" y="570" font-family="Arial" font-size="12">10m</text>
  <text x="245" y="570" font-family="Arial" font-size="12">20m</text>

  <!-- Legend -->
  <rect x="600" y="100" width="190" height="90" fill="white" stroke="black" stroke-width="1"/>
  <text x="605" y="120" font-family="Arial" font-size="12">Legend:</text>
  <rect x="605" y="130" width="10" height="10" fill="none" stroke="black" stroke-width="2"/>
  <text x="620" y="140" font-family="Arial" font-size="12">Foundation Elements</text>
</svg>
calculations:
CALCULATIONS

- **Building Load Calculation**:
  - Number of Floors: 3
  - Estimated Load per Tenant: 400 kg
  - Total Occupancy Load: 34 tenants x 400 kg = 13,600 kg
  - Load per Floor: 13,600 kg / 3 floors = 4,533 kg/floor

- **Foundation Design**:
  - Type: Spread Footing
  - Footing Size: 200 cm x 50 cm
  - Concrete Slab Thickness: 15 cm
  - Foundation Wall Thickness: 30 cm

- **Material Properties**:
  - Concrete Density: 2400 kg/m³
  - Steel Reinforcement: Assumed as per design standards

- **Soil Bearing Capacity**:
  - Assumed Safe Bearing Capacity: 150 kN/m²

Note: The calculations provided are basic estimates. Detailed structural analysis and soil testing are required for precise foundation design.
description: AI-generated foundation for: Three story apartment building to house 34 tenants

prompt: Three story apartment building to house 34 tenants
svgContent:
<svg viewBox="0 0 800 600" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <!-- Title Block -->
  <rect x="620" y="20" width="160" height="100" fill="#ffffff" stroke="#000000" stroke-width="0.5"/>
  <text x="630" y="40" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" fill="#000000">Project: Apartment Utility Layout</text>
  <text x="630" y="60" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" fill="#000000">Location: [Site Location]</text>
  <text x="630" y="80" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" fill="#000000">Date: [Date]</text>
  <text x="630" y="100" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" fill="#000000">Scale: 1:200</text>

  <!-- North Arrow -->
  <polygon points="50,150 70,150 60,130" fill="#000000"/>
  <line x1="60" y1="130" x2="60" y2="170" stroke="#000000" stroke-width="2"/>
  <text x="45" y="180" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" fill="#000000">N</text>

  <!-- Scale Bar -->
  <line x1="100" y1="550" x2="300" y2="550" stroke="#000000" stroke-width="2"/>
  <line x1="100" y1="545" x2="100" y2="555" stroke="#000000" stroke-width="2"/>
  <line x1="200" y1="545" x2="200" y2="555" stroke="#000000" stroke-width="2"/>
  <line x1="300" y1="545" x2="300" y2="555" stroke="#000000" stroke-width="2"/>
  <text x="95" y="570" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" fill="#000000">0</text>
  <text x="195" y="570" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" fill="#000000">100m</text>
  <text x="295" y="570" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" fill="#000000">200m</text>

  <!-- Legend -->
  <rect x="620" y="140" width="160" height="100" fill="#ffffff" stroke="#000000" stroke-width="0.5"/>
  <text x="630" y="160" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" fill="#000000">Legend</text>
  <rect x="630" y="180" width="10" height="10" fill="#3b82f6"/>
  <text x="650" y="190" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" fill="#000000">Water Line</text>
  <rect x="630" y="200" width="10" height="10" fill="#ef4444"/>
  <text x="650" y="210" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" fill="#000000">Sewer Line</text>
  <rect x="630" y="220" width="10" height="10" fill="#f59e0b"/>
  <text x="650" y="230" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" fill="#000000">Gas Line</text>
  <rect x="630" y="240" width="10" height="10" fill="#10b981"/>
  <text x="650" y="250" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" fill="#000000">Electric Line</text>

  <!-- Utility Lines -->
  <path d="M150,300 L400,300" stroke="#3b82f6" stroke-width="3"/>
  <text x="275" y="290" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#000000">Water Line</text>

  <path d="M150,320 L400,320" stroke="#ef4444" stroke-width="3"/>
  <text x="275" y="310" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#000000">Sewer Line</text>

  <path d="M150,340 L400,340" stroke="#f59e0b" stroke-width="3"/>
  <text x="275" y="330" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#000000">Gas Line</text>

  <path d="M150,360 L400,360" stroke="#10b981" stroke-width="3"/>
  <text x="275" y="350" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#000000">Electric Line</text>

  <!-- Building Outline -->
  <rect x="200" y="250" width="200" height="150" fill="none" stroke="#000000" stroke-width="2"/>
  <text x="260" y="240" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" fill="#000000">Apartment Building</text>

  <!-- DRAFT Watermark -->
  <text x="300" y="500" font-family="Arial" font-size="60" fill="#d1d5db" opacity="0.5" transform="rotate(-45 300,500)">DRAFT</text>
</svg>
calculations:
CALCULATIONS:**

1. **Water Demand:**
   - Average water usage per tenant = 150 liters/day.
   - Total demand = 34 tenants * 150 liters/day = 5100 liters/day or 5.1 m³/day.

2. **Sewer Design:**
   - Peak flow factor = 2.5 (standard for residential areas).
   - Total peak sewage = 5.1 m³/day * 2.5 = 12.75 m³/day.

3. **Gas Requirements:**
   - Average gas consumption = 3.5 m³/tenant/month.
   - Total gas requirement = 34 tenants * 3.5 m³/month = 119 m³/month.

4. **Electric Load:**
   - Average load per tenant = 1.5 kW.
   - Total load = 34 tenants * 1.5 kW = 51 kW.

These calculations assist in the layout of utility capacities and align with standard engineering design practices for residential buildings.
description: AI-generated utility layout for: Three story apartment building to house 34 tenants
